mapper.select:
select distinct t.dmzd,t.dmzdzwm from dd_bddm t
where t.dmzdzwm like '%${dmzdzwm}%'

select distinct t.dmzdzwm from dd_bddm t
where t.dmzdzwm like '%${dmzdzwm}%'

select distinct t.dmzd,t.dmzdzwm from dd_bddm t
where t.dmzd = #{dmzd}
mapper.update: update dd_bddm d set d.dm = #{dmNew},d.dmmc = #{dmmcNew} where d.dmzd = #{dmzd} and d.dmmc = #{dmmc} and d.dm = #{dm}
